ratings.comment: With little interest in psychology in high school, I only took this course because it is one of my graduate requirements. I now figured out that the concepts learned was fun and interesting after explanation. Professor Anthony is caring for students (and I think around 80% of the class can achieve an A), and the office hours are absolutely helpful.

She stresses her passion for learning very early in the course, and ensures students know the reasoning for her assignments. If you turn in your work on time and study properly (she teaches you how!), you will do well and learn a lot! Never met her personally as it was online, but she seems nice from the instruction videos. Would 100% recommend!
